title: CDisc Music
description:
🎵 CDisc Music lets you create custom music discs in Minecraft using Simple Voice Chat.
Supports YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud, VK, and Yandex Music.
body:
## 🎵 CDisc Music — Music Discs

CDisc Music lets you create custom music discs in Minecraft using Simple Voice Chat.
Supports **YouTube**, **Spotify**, **SoundCloud**, **VK**, **Yandex Music**, **tiktok 50/50**.

# 📦Commands:
- **/cdisc create** <query/URL> — create a music disc
- **/cdisc clear** — reset disc to vanilla
- **/cdisc reload** — reload config
- **/cdisc ytsetup** — setup YouTube OAuth

# 🔎Search prefixes:
- YouTube search - **yt:query**
- SoundCloud search - **sc:query**
- Spotify search - **sp:query**
- Yandex Music search - **ym:query**
- VK Music search - **vk:query**
- Tiktok search - **tt:query**

# 🔧Requirements:
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [ProtocolLib](https://github.com/dmulloy2/ProtocolLib/releases/)
- [Remote Cipher Server](https://github.com/kikkia/yt-cipher)
- [Spotify clientId + clientSecret](https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard)
- Yandex Music Token
- VK Music User Token
